summary: Plan-only classification for the fresh PR remediation shard. No GitHub mutations are planned because comment/close are blocked and merge recommendations require complete merge preflight proof that the artifact does not provide. Non-security candidates are kept on their own finalization paths; one hydrated security-sensitive linked PR is routed centrally.
